# 与上游 GPT-SoVITS（RVC-Boss/GPT-SoVITS）对齐的依赖；在缺少 requirements-lock.txt 时供 setup_env.sh 使用。
# 若你有原包中的 requirements-lock.txt，优先使用 lock 以复现一致环境。
# Python 3.13：PyPI 仅提供 numpy 2.x 的 wheel，故按版本分支约束。
# Windows：不使用 --no-binary=opencc（优先 wheel）；pyopenjtalk 需本地编译，非日语场景可跳过（见下行环境标记）。
numpy<2.0; python_version < "3.13"
numpy>=2.0,<3; python_version >= "3.13"
scipy
tensorboard
librosa==0.10.2
numba
pytorch-lightning>=2.4
gradio<5
ffmpeg-python
onnxruntime; platform_machine == "aarch64" or platform_machine == "arm64"
onnxruntime-gpu; platform_machine == "x86_64" or platform_machine == "AMD64"
tqdm
funasr==1.0.27
cn2an
pypinyin
pyopenjtalk>=0.4.1; sys_platform != 'win32'
g2p_en
torchaudio
modelscope
sentencepiece
transformers>=4.43,<=4.50
peft<0.18.0
chardet
PyYAML
psutil
jieba_fast; sys_platform != 'win32'
jieba
split-lang
fast_langdetect>=0.3.1
wordsegment
rotary_embedding_torch
ToJyutping
g2pk2
ko_pron
opencc
python_mecab_ko; sys_platform != 'win32'
fastapi[standard]>=0.115.2
x_transformers
torchmetrics<=1.5
pydantic<=2.10.6
ctranslate2>=4.0,<5
av>=11
tqdm
